description: Deepen the frontend data-access layer by introducing a typed repository layer in lib/repos/. Each repo is a class implementing an interface. A central lib/repos/index.ts exports one singleton per repo wired to the real Supabase client. Pages import from this index; client components call thin lib call-throughs. Tests use in-memory fakes instead of vi.mock query-chain setup. See docs/adr/0003-frontend-repository-layer.md and GitHub issue #24.

userStories.title: Create IAuthRepo interface and SupabaseAuthRepo class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all supabase.auth.* calls behind an IAuthRepo interface implemented by SupabaseAuthRepo, so that auth behaviour can be changed in one place and callers never import supabase directly for auth.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/AuthRepo.ts exports IAuthRepo interface with methods: getUser, getSession, signIn, signUp, signOut, updateUser, onAuthStateChange (returns unsubscribe fn)
SupabaseAuthRepo implements IAuthRepo, accepts SupabaseClient via constructor
No singleton exported from AuthRepo.ts — instances are created in index.ts only
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create IMembersRepo interface and SupabaseMembersRepo class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want member queries behind an IMembersRepo interface, so that join logic across participations, memberships, assignments, and discipline_scopes is encapsulated in one class.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/MembersRepo.ts exports IMembersRepo interface with methods: getMembersForProject, getPendingInvitesForProject, updateDiscipline
SupabaseMembersRepo implements IMembersRepo, accepts SupabaseClient via constructor
Logic is migrated from lib/members.ts — same queries, same return types
No singleton exported from MembersRepo.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create IProjectsRepo interface and SupabaseProjectsRepo class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want project queries behind an IProjectsRepo interface, so that the org join and RLS-scoped query live in one class.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/ProjectsRepo.ts exports IProjectsRepo interface with methods: getProjectsForUser, createProject
SupabaseProjectsRepo implements IProjectsRepo, accepts SupabaseClient via constructor
getProjectsForUser logic migrated from lib/projects.ts
createProject wraps the create_project_with_discipline RPC currently in dashboard/page.tsx
No singleton exported from ProjectsRepo.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create IOrgRepo interface and SupabaseOrgRepo class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want org creation behind an IOrgRepo interface, so that the create_org_with_membership RPC is not embedded in a page component.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/OrgRepo.ts exports IOrgRepo interface with method: createOrg
SupabaseOrgRepo implements IOrgRepo, accepts SupabaseClient via constructor
createOrg wraps the create_org_with_membership RPC currently in dashboard/page.tsx
No singleton exported from OrgRepo.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create IDashboardRepo interface and SupabaseDashboardRepo class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dashboard queries behind an IDashboardRepo interface, so that the three-query aggregate fetch is one function call from the page.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/DashboardRepo.ts exports IDashboardRepo interface with method: getProjectDashboard
SupabaseDashboardRepo implements IDashboardRepo, accepts SupabaseClient via constructor
Logic migrated from lib/dashboard.ts — same queries, same return type
No singleton exported from DashboardRepo.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create IActivityRepo interface and SupabaseActivityRepo class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want activity queries and feedback recording behind an IActivityRepo interface, so that ActivityTab never imports supabase directly.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/ActivityRepo.ts exports IActivityRepo interface with methods: getActivityForProcedure(testProcedureId, agentRunId), recordFeedback(agentRunId, userId, feedbackType)
SupabaseActivityRepo implements IActivityRepo, accepts SupabaseClient via constructor
getActivityForProcedure encapsulates the agent_runs and test_procedure_instances queries currently in ActivityTab.tsx
recordFeedback encapsulates the record_feedback RPC and feedback_records update currently in ActivityTab.tsx
No singleton exported from ActivityRepo.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire all repo singletons in lib/repos/index.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all repo singletons exported from a single lib/repos/index.ts, so that callers have one import path and the wiring between repos and the Supabase client is visible in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/repos/index.ts imports supabase from lib/supabase and all six repo classes
lib/repos/index.ts exports: authRepo, membersRepo, projectsRepo, orgRepo, dashboardRepo, activityRepo as named singleton instances
No other file in lib/repos/ exports an instance
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add lib/activity.ts call-through for ActivityTab
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a thin lib/activity.ts call-through so that ActivityTab (a client component) can call getActivityForProcedure and recordFeedback without importing from lib/repos/index.ts directly.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/activity.ts exports getActivityForProcedure and recordFeedback functions
Both functions delegate to activityRepo from lib/repos/index.ts
ActivityTab.tsx updated to import from lib/activity.ts instead of calling supabase directly
ActivityTab.tsx no longer imports supabase at all
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Migrate auth pages and components to use authRepo
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all supabase.auth.* calls in pages and components replaced with authRepo calls, so that the auth seam is consistent across the entire frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: SignInForm.tsx calls authRepo.signIn instead of supabase.auth.signInWithPassword
SignUpForm.tsx calls authRepo.signUp instead of supabase.auth.signUp
auth/page.tsx calls authRepo.getSession and authRepo.onAuthStateChange instead of supabase.auth.*
accept-invite/page.tsx calls authRepo.getSession, authRepo.getUser, authRepo.updateUser, authRepo.onAuthStateChange instead of supabase.auth.*
dashboard/page.tsx calls authRepo.getSession and authRepo.signOut instead of supabase.auth.*
UploadModal.tsx calls authRepo.getSession instead of supabase.auth.getSession
None of these files import supabase directly after this change
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Migrate dashboard page RPC calls to orgRepo and projectsRepo
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the create_org_with_membership and create_project_with_discipline RPC calls in dashboard/page.tsx replaced with orgRepo.createOrg and projectsRepo.createProject, so that RPC logic is not embedded in a page component.
acceptanceCriteria: dashboard/page.tsx calls orgRepo.createOrg instead of supabase.rpc('create_org_with_membership')
dashboard/page.tsx calls projectsRepo.createProject instead of supabase.rpc('create_project_with_discipline')
dashboard/page.tsx no longer calls supabase.rpc directly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace vi.mock tests with InMemoryMembersRepo fake
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the existing vi.mock-based members tests replaced with an InMemoryMembersRepo fake, so that tests couple to the function's return shape rather than its internal Supabase query chain.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/__tests__/members.test.ts rewritten to use new InMemoryMembersRepo() instead of vi.mock('../supabase')
InMemoryMembersRepo implements IMembersRepo, stores data in plain JS arrays, supports a seed() method
All existing test cases still pass (joined rows, empty project, member without discipline, pending invites, expired invites, updateDiscipline idempotency)
No vi.mock or supabase query chain setup in the file
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace vi.mock tests with InMemoryDashboardRepo and InMemoryProjectsRepo fakes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the existing vi.mock-based dashboard and projects tests replaced with in-memory fakes, so that all data-layer tests are consistent and free of query-chain mocking.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/__tests__/dashboard.test.ts rewritten using InMemoryDashboardRepo implementing IDashboardRepo
lib/__tests__/projects.test.ts rewritten using InMemoryProjectsRepo implementing IProjectsRepo
All existing test cases still pass
No vi.mock or supabase query chain setup in either file
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Delete old flat lib files and verify no direct supabase imports remain outside lib/repos
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the old lib/projects.ts, lib/members.ts, and lib/dashboard.ts deleted and a final sweep confirming no file outside lib/repos/ imports supabase directly for data queries.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/projects.ts deleted
lib/members.ts deleted
lib/dashboard.ts deleted
grep for 'supabase.from' and 'supabase.rpc' outside lib/repos/ returns no results
grep for 'supabase.auth' outside lib/repos/ returns no results
All existing tests still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Some pages still have direct supabase imports but they're outside the scope of the migrated functionality
